title: neobartlettia pinabetensis
intro: Neobartlettia pinabetensis, a flowering plant native to Mexico, is a species of aster family (Asteraceae) characterized by its yellow daisy-like flowers and edible leaves. The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Neobartlettia pinabetensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in traditional medicine, with the leaves and flowers being used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
